---
title: "Teaching team"
editor: 
  mode: source
---

+--------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------+
| Mug                | Name          | Role          | Office Hours           |
+====================+===============+===============+========================+
|                    |               | TA            |                        |
+--------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------+
|                    |               | TA            |                        |
+--------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------+
|                    |               | TA            |                        |
+--------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------+
| ![](jz.jpg){.circ} | Zito, John    | Instructor    | Tue 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM\ |
|                    |               |               | *or by appointment*    |
|                    |               |               | Old Chem 207\          |
+--------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------+
